data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a 'Final settlement audit trail' as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this audit trail within the saga lifecycle. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in coverage for this requirement.
gaps: Final settlement audit trail is not validated or evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of the final settlement audit trail.
